subject: [PATCH 2/9] sched/core: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel to defer WARN console output under rq->lock or ->pi_lock. It replaces WARN*() calls with SCHED_WARN*() variants, which emit warnings asynchronously via irq_work instead of synchronously. This change prevents potential deadlocks that could occur when a legacy or boot console is configured. The patch affects various parts of the kernel's scheduler core and should improve system reliability.
